rationale: Keep: the citing note explicitly states it “complements Johnson, Lewis, and Nubbemeyer (2017),” and the matched DOI is exactly 10.1509/jmr.15.0297. The two papers directly overlap on causal retargeting measurement design (PSA/ITT/LATE-style experimentation and the advertiser measurement gap), so this is plausibly a methodological/foundational comparison rather than an incidental mention.
